graded.name: Mahindra & Mahindra
graded.thesis: Strong demand for utility vehicles, healthy rural sentiment, and robust order book position are likely to drive continued outperformance in the auto sector.

graded.name: Maruti Suzuki India
graded.thesis: India's largest passenger vehicle maker is benefiting from strong demand in the SUV segment and new model launches, contributing to overall auto sector strength.

graded.name: ICICI Bank
graded.thesis: The financial sector, particularly private banks, continues to show resilience with healthy credit growth and improving asset quality, supported by strong DII flows.

graded.name: Tata Consumer Products
graded.thesis: As a leading FMCG player, it offers defensive characteristics and benefits from stable consumer demand, diversified product portfolio, and potential for margin improvement.

graded.name: Hindalco Industries
graded.thesis: The metal sector is witnessing sustained selling pressure and declining prices, indicating further downside potential due to global commodity price headwinds.
